methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing maize pollen to assess the impact of Mu insertion into the EXPB1 gene on Zea m 1 production.

steps.description: Maize pollen was collected in July 2004 from EXPB1/EXPB1 and expb1/expb1 plants grown at The Pennsylvania State University Agricultural Experiment Station at Rock Springs PA.
steps.searchable_summary: collect maize pollen from specified plants

steps.description: Pollen was cleaned by passing through a series of sieves and stored separately at -80°C.
steps.searchable_summary: clean and store maize pollen at -80°C

methods.description: Extraction and quantification of proteins from maize pollen for further analysis.

steps.description: Approximately 25 mg of maize pollen was extracted in 4 volumes (0.1 mL) of 50 mM sodium acetate, pH 4.5, for 1 h at 4°C.
steps.searchable_summary: extract proteins from maize pollen using sodium acetate buffer

steps.description: The extract was centrifuged at 20,800 g for 10 min.
Proteins in the supernatant were quantified colorimetrically with the Coomassie PlusH Protein Assay Reagent.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify proteins using Coomassie PlusH assay

methods.description: Separation and analysis of proteins using 2-dimensional gel electrophoresis.

steps.description: Proteins were subjected to 2-dimensional gel electrophoresis. For the first dimension - isoelectric focusing (IEF) - Immobiline DryStrip gels and IPG buffer were used.
steps.searchable_summary: perform isoelectric focusing on protein samples

steps.description: Gels were rehydrated for 16 h with rehydration buffer containing the protein extracts and then focused in a PROTEAN IEF cell apparatus.
steps.searchable_summary: rehydrate and focus gels in IEF apparatus

steps.description: After IEF, gels were incubated in SDS equilibration buffer with dithiothreitol and then with iodoacetamide.
steps.searchable_summary: incubate gels in SDS equilibration buffer

steps.description: For the second dimension, proteins were separated by discontinuous SDS-PAGE using 12.5% precast gels.
2-D gels were stained for protein with SYPRO Ruby and quantified using a laser scanner and 2-D image analysis software.
steps.searchable_summary: stain and quantify proteins on 2-D gels

methods.description: Identification of b-expansins using immunoblot analysis on 2-D gels.

steps.description: 2-D gels were subjected to immunoblot analysis using monoclonal and polyclonal antibodies against Lol p 1.
